items.title: Chicago Bears’ appeal to NFL Commissioner Roger Goodell over compensatory picks ruling is still alive
items.summary: Chicago Bears executives confirmed Wednesday that they met in person with NFL brass to discuss the league’s decision to deny them compensatory draft picks despite Ian Cunningham’s hiring as Atlanta Falcons general manager, and that their appeal is ongoing. Bears Chairman George McCaskey said team officials met with NFL Commissioner Roger Goodell at the league’s headquarters in New York. The ...

items.title: NFLPA: Player safety requires trained, pro refs
items.summary: Player safety requires "trained, professional officials on the field," NFLPA executive director JC Tretter said in a statement amid ongoing contract negotiations between the NFL and the NFL Referees Association.

items.title: Goodell backs Rooney Rule amid litigation threat
items.summary: NFL commissioner Roger Goodell says he believes the Rooney Rule is "consistent" with hiring laws after recently being threatened by Florida's attorney general with potential civil litigation if the rule was not eliminated.

items.title: Rooney: Rodgers to make decision before draft
items.summary: Steelers owner and team president Art Rooney II said Tuesday he anticipates a decision from four-time NFL MVP Aaron Rodgers about his future by next month's NFL draft.

items.title: Sources: OBJ meets with Giants at NFL meetings
items.summary: Odell Beckham Jr. came to the Arizona Biltmore during the NFL's annual meetings and met with Giants coach John Harbaugh on Monday about potentially joining the team, sources told ESPN.

items.title: 🐝 Buzz from the NFL league meeting
items.summary: The NFL's annual league meeting wrapped up Tuesday, and 30 of our reporters shared all the buzz from Phoenix.

items.title: NFL owners OK Davis' Raiders succession plan
items.summary: NFL owners on Tuesday approved a Las Vegas Raiders succession plan that will give Silver Lake co-chief executive officer Egon Durban the option to purchase a majority stake in the team from owner Mark Davis, commissioner Roger Goodell said.

items.title: Colts add 2 more former Lou Anarumo players: Cam Taylor-Britt and Akeem Davis-Gaither

items.title: Former Colts WR T.Y. Hilton announces retirement from NFL
items.summary: Hilton, who spent a decade in Indianapolis, ranks third in Colts history in receptions (631) and receiving yards (9,691).

items.title: Colts sign free agent WR Nick Westbrook-Ikhine
items.summary: Westbrook-Ikhine played at Indiana University and has spent six seasons in the NFL with the Tennessee Titans (2024-24) and Miami Dolphins (2025).

items.summary: Davis-Gaither played for the Cincinnati Bengals under Lou Anarumo from 2020-24.
